findings: Functions: 1/3 hallucinated references (task 2: validateSchema, normalizeFields not in utils)
GraphSpec: 1 semantic error caught via catalog inspection (batch vs sliding window in task 3)
Functions: 2 subtle bugs (alert-spam in task 3, ambiguous iteration in task 1)
Functions: 1 implicit dependency issue (mutable global state in task 3)
Both treatments produced functionally correct outputs for simple (low) tasks
Divergence appeared at medium and high complexity
summary.g0_direction: positive — catalog constraint prevents hallucination, structural deps prevent implicit state
